1000.description: Normal Closure: The connection was closed normally.

1001.description: Going Away: The endpoint is shutting down, such as server closure or user navigating away.

1002.description: Protocol Error: The connection was terminated due to a protocol error.

1003.description: Unsupported Data: Received unsupported data type.

1006.description: Abnormal Closure: No close frame was sent or received.

1011.description: Internal Error: A server-side internal error occurred.
